programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A pair of newlyweds searches southeast Michigan for a lakeside retreat where they can plant roots and start a family.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A couple searches for a vacation home in a friendly community along the shores of Lake Eufaula, Okla., for their children to enjoy.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A Missouri couple with a long history of visiting Kentucky Lake, Ky., is determined to find a permanent retreat where they can indulge in the area's natural beauty; they bring their teen daughter along to help scope out what the area has to offer.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A couple with two daughters currently lives in Lansing, N.Y.; they want to remain in the Cayuga Lake region, but they're looking for a more spacious home closer to the lake's lapping shores.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: An Alabama couple that grew up fishing and relaxing on the water want to pass that lifestyle down to their newborn by moving the family to Smith Lake.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A family that frequents the Brainerd Lakes area of Minnesota has a dream of owning a cabin in this location; now that the kids are about to head off to college, they feel like it is time to take the leap and purchase their waterfront dream home.
